roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PROGRESS REPORT/X:PROOF OF 9 MONTH ENROLLMENT ALCOHOL OR DRUG PROGRAM IS FILED WITH THE COURT/CTORD: SCRAM BRACLET MAY BE TAKEN OFF TODAY/X:DEFENDANT TO CONTINUE ON PROBATION/X:NO FUTURE DATES REQUIRED/

/TWS/CH1:CJSS 6 M:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:6/SWAPD:12-16-11/OR/PF390NEW/VF2:100/FOP1:9 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/MPROBFINE/PC/SECFEE40/ICNA/1463ALC/EMAT/OR25/OBEY/ACCEP/X:RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY ADULT PROBATION/X:HARVEY WAIVERTAKEN ON RESTITUTION ON DISMISSED CHARGES/X:AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO DO ALCOHOL AND  DRUG TESTING AS DETERMINED BY APD FOR A PERIOD OF 3 YEARS/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ADULT PROBATION FORTHWITH TO HAVE A SCRAM BRACLET PUT ON/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT TO WEAR A SCRAM BRACLET FOR 6 MONTHS AND ADULT PROBATION MAY DETERMINE WHETHER THE BRACLET CAN BE TAKEN OFF EARLIER/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/PROG:12-19-11/DOP/PROG:12-30-11/DOP/CONTD:PROG RPT - PROOF OF SCRAM/DOP/CONTD:PROGRESS RPT/DOP/

/CAL: FORTHWITH FROM DEPT 17 FOR PLEA/CTORD:PLEA TAKEN IS HEREBY VACATED//X:DEPUTY JOSEPH IS SWORN BY THE CLERK, AND INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT SMELLS OF ALCOHOL/SHER/BAIL:20000/CONTD:POSSIBLE PLEA/DOP/

/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT & PROOF OF SCRAM/DEF:HAS PROVIDED PROOF OF SCRAM BRACELET/X:12-30-11 PROG RPT CONFIRMED,/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT/
